panels.description: ceph version based on the version running in the monitors
panels.title: Ceph Version

matcher.options: {container="mgr", endpoint="http-metrics", instance="10.131.0.10:9283", job="rook-ceph-mgr", managedBy="ocs-storagecluster", namespace="openshift-storage", pod="rook-ceph-mgr-a-84fb4f8597-5b2mg", prometheus="openshift-monitoring/k8s", service="rook-ceph-mgr"}

panels.description: Total of IOPS for rbd devices within the cluster
panels.title: Client IOPS (rbd* devices)

panels.description: Sum of cpu usage for ALL noobaa daemons expessed as a percentage of cpu cores (i.e. > 100% = 1 core, 200% = 2 cores)
panels.title: Total Noobaa CPU Core Usage

panels.description: Count of the number of noobaa endpoints in the cluster. The red line depicts the scaling limit.
panels.title: Noobaa Endpoints Active

panels.description: This is the primary PG count
panels.title: PG Count by Pool

targets.expr: sum by(cluster, hostname) (rate(ceph_osd_op{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]) * on(cluster, ceph_daemon) group_left(hostname) ceph_osd_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"})

sum by(cluster, hostname) ((rate(ceph_osd_op_in_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]) + rate(ceph_osd_op_out_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m])) * on(cluster, ceph_daemon) group_left(hostname) ceph_osd_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"})

panels.description: Network receive + transmit bytes for all active (UP) physical interfaces on each host in the cluster

targets.expr:
(sum by(cluster, instance) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", device=~"(eth|en).*"}[10m]) * on(cluster, instance, device) node_network_info{cluster=~"$cluster", operstate="up"})) +
(sum by(cluster, instance) (rate(node_network_transmit_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", device=~"(eth|en).*"}[10m]) * on(cluster, instance, device) node_network_info{cluster=~"$cluster", operstate="up"}))

sum by(cluster, instance) (rate(node_network_transmit_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster", device=~"(eth|en).*"}[10m]) * on(cluster, instance, device) node_network_info{cluster=~"$cluster", operstate="up"})

panels.title: Total Bandwidth by Host

panels.description: Network receive + transmit bytes for all active (UP) physical interfaces on each host in the cluster
panels.title: Network Load : $worker

panels.description: Links speed and MTU size on physical interfaces in an UP state

targets.expr: node_network_up{cluster=~"$cluster", instance="$worker",device=~"(eth|en).*"} * on(cluster, instance, device) node_network_info{cluster=~"$cluster", operstate="up"}
node_network_mtu_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance="$worker",device=~"(eth|en).*"} * on(cluster, instance, device) node_network_info{cluster=~"$cluster", operstate="up"}

panels.title: NIC Configuration : $worker

panels.description: Count of rbd images with read activity
panels.title: RBDs Active

panels.description: Needs the rbd_stats_pools set in mgr/prometheus

targets.expr: round(rate(ceph_rbd_read_ops{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]),1)  * on(cluster, image) group_left(volumename) label_replace(ocs_rbd_pv_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"},"volumename","$1","name","(.*)") * on(cluster, volumename) group_left(persistentvolumeclaim) kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info{cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}

round(rate(ceph_rbd_write_ops{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]),1) * on(cluster, image) group_left(volumename) label_replace(ocs_rbd_pv_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"},"volumename","$1","name","(.*)") * on(cluster, volumename) group_left(persistentvolumeclaim) kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info{cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}

panels.title: PVC IOPS : $pvc

panels.description: Needs the rbd_stats_pools set in mgr/prometheus

targets.expr: round(rate(ceph_rbd_read_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]),1)  * on(cluster, image) group_left(volumename) label_replace(ocs_rbd_pv_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"},"volumename","$1","name","(.*)") * on(cluster, volumename) group_left(persistentvolumeclaim) kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info{cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}

round(rate(ceph_rbd_write_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]),1) * on(cluster, image) group_left(volumename) label_replace(ocs_rbd_pv_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"},"volumename","$1","name","(.*)") * on(cluster, volumename) group_left(persistentvolumeclaim) kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info{cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}

panels.title: PVC Throughput : $pvc

panels.description: Needs the rbd_stats_pools set in mgr/prometheus

targets.expr: (rate(ceph_rbd_read_latency_sum{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]) / clamp_min(rate(ceph_rbd_read_latency_count{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]),1))  * on(cluster, image) group_left(volumename) label_replace(ocs_rbd_pv_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"},"volumename","$1","name","(.*)") * on(cluster, volumename) group_left(persistentvolumeclaim) kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info{cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}

(rate(ceph_rbd_write_latency_sum{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]) / clamp_min(rate(ceph_rbd_write_latency_count{cluster=~"$cluster"}[10m]),1))  * on(cluster, image) group_left(volumename) label_replace(ocs_rbd_pv_metadata{cluster=~"$cluster"},"volumename","$1","name","(.*)") * on(cluster, volumename) group_left(persistentvolumeclaim) kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info{cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}

panels.title: PVC Latency : $pvc

panels.description: Total of IOPS for rbd devices within the cluster
panels.title: Client IOPS - ALL rbd images
